programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: We’re revisiting Louise Sapsford, boredom binger Tracy Morgan and too lazy to eat Alex Law and finding out 3 years down the line if their time in the feeding clinic did anything to change their disastrous diets.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight we’re revisiting some of the major success stories from the last series of Supersize Vs Superskinny.Junk food addict Andy Stain, his diet swap partner too busy to eat mum Hannah Ames and Caffeine quaffingJade Potts.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Keith is a 33 year old dance floor DJ who is desperate for a date. 25 year old BT Manager Tiffany despises ‘bad’ foods. She has a strong desire to be healthy but has a very small appetite.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: At just 6 stone 10lbs, 19 year old Tatiana Moxfis extremely underweight and desperate for people to stop asking her if she's got an eating disorder

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tipping the scales just over 6 stones, 41-year-old Elizabeth Young thinks she's found the elixer to eternal youth-starving herself.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Director Down
programme.desc: A ruptured brain aneurysm threatens to kill the ER's medical director, making Dr Yamarick face one of his most difficult moments.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Oh, Deer!
programme.desc: A college student's head is impaled by a trophy deer's antlers; a car crash victim leads the doctor to believe her baby may still be at the accident scene; a nurse's ex-boyfriend brings his new girlfriend to the ER and the nurse must help save her life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: When a bride on her way to her wedding suffers facial injuries in a car accident she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: OLD SCHOOL MEDICINE
programme.desc: A surgeon requires urgent treatment after falling off a bed while trying to help his patient; a man with a slashed wrist has a startling secret; a woman gives birth to an intact amniotic sac.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: CAN'T STOP ITCHING
programme.desc: A man itching from poison oak exposure turns out to also have maggots burrowing into an injury on his back; a young woman has a bleeding lip, but doctors can't find the source of the bleed; three car accident victims are admitted to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Medieval Mayhem
programme.desc: A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head; a critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him; two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: We Have A Heartbeat
programme.desc: A carjacker has shot a policewoman in the chest; A homeless woman has cellulitis; A drug dealer is unresponsive after having been beaten. Two middle-aged men with severe burns; A man in his 70s has been found unresponsive in a public place.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Code Black
programme.desc: The force of a tornado drove a fence picket through Julie's neck. With it blocking her airways, the only way of saving her is to pull it out.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.
programme.sub-title: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Airline Addict_Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was 5. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara, Gari, taking him for walks and teaching him tricks.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Buggin' Out_Dumpster Diet
programme.desc: Bugs have been a part of David’s daily diet for over twelve years, watch as he braces himself to eat his most venomous bug yet. Kelly’s daily diet consists of food solely gathered from the dumpster.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Inflatables/Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating with them, sleeping with them and even bathing them. Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession / Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the same size. Jennifer is addicted to eating mattresses.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.
programme.sub-title: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Troll Takeover_Stuffing Animals
programme.desc: The Smith family has a collection of 213 stuffed and mounted animals throughout their home. Michelle’s obsession with trolls threatens her relationship with her family.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Wow Factor
programme.desc: Giulia and Scott have recently come into an inheritance and want the house of their dreams. Currently, they live in a modest bungalow in a busy neighbourhood but would prefer to live in a secluded house.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Daughter's Plan
programme.desc: Kevin is a retired, successful businessman. He is a single dad to Shannon and Jennifer. Shannon has been accepted into the Ontario Veterinarian College at the University of Guelph.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Feels Like Home
programme.desc: Laura is on the hunt for a new home for long time clients Marino and Paula. The couple and their three kids would like a spacious house with a country feel to escape their hectic lifestyles.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Century Homes
programme.desc: Louise, Jason, and their two children have been living in Europe for the past 10 years, but now they would like to be closer to their family in Canada. Louise absolutely adores the European aesthetic.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Waterfront
programme.desc: Diogo is a dedicated musician working on his new album. He has been debating between moving to Miami or staying in Canada. Toronto is closer to his family and where he feels at home with his music.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Retirement
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Michael are retired and want to move closer to their kids and grandchildren. They want to downsize from their two-story house into a bungalow. Luckily, Eve knows all about luxury bungalows.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Country Home
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Smart Decision
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pool House
programme.desc: Kathryn and Neil are true urbanites. They love what downtown Toronto has to offer. When Neil found out his company was relocating to Guelph, they weren't thrilled.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Love the Location
programme.desc: Ashley and Ali are ready to take their relationship and living situation to the next level. The young entrepreneurs are prepared to move into a house, but the one thing they can't agree on is where to live.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big Move
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Favourite Homes
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House For an Athlete
programme.desc: ??George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Treetops
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wendy and Daniel are looking to downsize after their kids have moved out, but still want an elegant home. She's a physical therapist and she's a business analyst.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Family Home
programme.desc: Vipin’s family of four are in the market to purchase their own dream home in the Greater Toronto Area.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House of Dreams
programme.desc: Phil and Claire, a newly wed couple, are searching for their dream home in Castlemore.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous Luxury
programme.desc: Elvira and Robert are looking for a home with a history, but want to make sure it is post-renovation.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Modern Resident
programme.desc: Dana and Eric have worked hard building their successful family business, and are finally ready to buy their family's dream home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Unique Design
programme.desc: With a budget between $5 and $12 million and Real Estate Agent Tav Schembri is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Remarkable Housing
programme.desc: Young, entrepreneurial couple Jonathan and Kerry want to start a family, and are looking to buy their first family home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home or Abroad
programme.desc: Real estate broker Jasmine Xuereb helps home buyers Cindy and Andrew find their dream property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Private Island
programme.desc: Katerina and Mauricio are looking for one property in Canada and a holiday home in Belize, specifically on a private island.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous Resort
programme.desc: Fernando and his investment group are looking to either buy or build a resort in Canada or Mexico with the help of Joe Petrella Construction.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Canada or Belize Holiday Dream Home
programme.desc: Real Estate Agents Jasmine Xuereb & Laura Compagni team up to aid power couple Jamie and Jennifer in purchasing either a real estate investment in Canada or Belize.
programme.sub-title: Canada or Belize Holiday Dream Home

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Central American Dream Home
programme.desc: Homeowners Patricia & Taheer are looking for a change of scenery.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Mexican Sunset
programme.desc: Since working from home has become increasingly popular, Paul and Sonia are entertaining the idea of living and working abroad.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Dream Homes in Dubai
programme.desc: Mike team up once again with local agent to find a unique opportunities for residential investments.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Best of Havana
programme.desc: Marshall and Maria can't decide whether they should buy a property in Canada (Marshall's homeland) or Cuba (Maria's homeland).

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS: Cops Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Two in the Bush
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Undeniably Fishy
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Nothing to See Here
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.
programme.sub-title: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer

programme.title: COPS: Cops Love Gone Bad
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Crying Over Spilled Milk
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Front Door Felony
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS: Cops No Helmet, No Ride
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Sidewalk Licker
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS: Cops From Sixty to Zero
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.
